libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required before generation. Generated tests should adapt to the 2.0.7 public APIs rather than reusing 2.0.6 constructor signatures.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that attempt a full Maven build or artifact resolution may read user settings/local repository or contact remote repositories; meaningful coverage should prefer offline/resource/version/diagnostic APIs unless the test deliberately creates isolated temp settings and repositories.
Maven 2.0.7 is old and has raw-type APIs and constructor differences from nearby versions, so generated tests must compile against the resolved 2.0.7 artifacts.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: maven-core 2.0.7 resolves its Maven 2.x runtime dependencies transitively and the jar includes the relevant META-INF/plexus and Maven resource files; meaningful offline coverage is reachable without extra dependency, Docker, or environment/system-property setup. The reported javac failure is caused by version-specific constructor API drift in maven-artifact exceptions, not missing setup.
